name: Property Search (Canada)
description: Watch realtor.ca for new MLS listings by postal code or location.

settings._comment: Program-defined; the job reads this from its own working directory. Reserved for future realtor.ca search filters — property-search currently ignores it.

steps.title: Sign in / clear the realtor.ca bot check
steps.instructions: A Chrome window will open realtor.ca. Solve any "Pardon Our Interruption" check, and if a location prompt appears click Block. Then close the window — the clearance cookies persist in the profile. (If realtor.ca shows "Access Denied" you're on a blocked VPN/proxy IP; turn it off and retry.)
